meaning: n.哑巴,哑音字母,[律]拒不答辩的被告,弱音器adj.哑的,无声的,沉默的vt.减弱...的声音vi.排泄
examples: He was mute, distant, and indifferent.
She thought it better to mute her criticism.
The child sat mute in the corner of the room.
With less disposable income, consumers will spend less and the economy would likely mute.
But having these operatives work with the African peacekeepers should help mute those cries.
